title: The World Government’s Shadow
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Rayleigh, tell me, what happened to rocks?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Roger's ship is on the move!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This event would leave no mark on the pages of history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The crumbling Island was swallowed by the waves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Like curtains closing on a grand stage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The silence in the incident's wake lasted only a moment...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before a massive bolt of lightning split the heavens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The curtain rose for new tales to unfold.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, Cap'n!! I'm dying to open up the treasure chests!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't you care about me at all?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND WE SCORED A TON OF TREASURE TO BOTOT!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
